title: Best Saturation x Fresh Animations
description: A TexturePack (ResoucePack) that makes BestSaturation_pack compatible with FreshAnimations
body:
This pack bridges the vibrant saturation of **BestSaturationPack** with the immersive magic of **FreshAnimations**, creating a richer, more cohesive visual experience. > ⚠️ **This is a parity compatibility pack.** > It is **100% required** to have **FreshAnimations** installed for it to work properly.

---

--- ✅ **Recommended setup for best results:** - Install **[ETF] Entity Texture Features** and **[EMF] Entity Model Features**, or use **OptiFine**. - Use the official **FreshAnimations** as a base. - Add **BestSaturationPack** for the full visual experience.
